scripts.setup:supabase-help:
node -e "console.log('
1. Open: https://supabase.com/dashboard/project/mprfgqnmtobbqycvtatd/sql/new
2. Run VERIFY_DATABASE.sql to diagnose
3. Run SETUP_SUPABASE.sql (full fix) or FIX_DATABASE.sql (grants only)
4. npm run check:supabase
')"
